published state<br>shared facts &amp; master data<br>classifications &amp; features<br>historical aggregates<br>policies &amp; semantics</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="280" width="310" x="60" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="opBox" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fdf1dc;strokeColor=#c79433;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#7a5a14;arcSize=8;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<font style="font-size:17px"><b>OPERATIONAL REALITY</b></font><br><br><font style="font-size:13px">transactions &amp; decisions<br>user actions &amp; events<br>measurements &amp; telemetry<br>current workflow state<br>locally computed observations</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="280" width="310" x="830" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="centerBox" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#1f3a4d;strokeWidth=3;fontColor=#1f3a4d;arcSize=6;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<font style="font-size:19px"><b>THE LOCAL INTERSECTION</b></font><br><font style="font-size:13px" color="#5b7282"><i>the consumer&#39;s reasoning capacity</i></font><br><br><font style="font-size:14px">joins &#183; aggregation &#183; inference<br>screening &#183; optimization &#183; prediction</font><br><br><font style="font-size:15px" color="#1f3a4d"><b>where cross-domain decisions<br>become locally computable</b></font><br><font style="font-size:12px" color="#5b7282"><i>one computational boundary</i></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="360" width="340" x="430" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="refArrow" edge="1" parent="1" source="refBox" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#3f7e6e;strokeWidth=3;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="centerBox" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="opArrow" edge="1" parent="1" source="opBox" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#c79433;strokeWidth=3;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="centerBox" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
